title: conyza rouyana
intro: Conyza rouyana, also known as Rough Fleabane, is a perennial herb native to South America, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Conyza rouyana include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Conyza rouyana can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
